name: OpenEgo
source_datasets: CaptainCook4D, HOI4D, HoloAssist, EgoDex, HOT3D, HO-Cap
data_access: project-script (UT Dallas Box; download script promised)
license: mixed per-source (MIT code; constituents vary, some CC BY-NC-ND)
redistribution: restricted and mixed: each source keeps its own license (some CC BY-NC-ND), and the EgoDex-derived subset needs author permission
suitability: download+cluster target with caveats: unified timestamped language primitives, mixed licenses
focus_en: Consolidates six egocentric corpora (1,107 h, 290 tasks) into a unified 21-joint hand-pose format with intention-aligned, timestamped language primitives.
focus_cn: 将六个第一人称语料库（1,107 小时、290 个任务）整合为统一的 21 关节手部姿态格式，并配以意图对齐、带时间戳的语言基元。
datapath_en: OpenEgo consolidates six public egocentric corpora (CaptainCook4D, HOI4D, HoloAssist, EgoDex, HOT3D, and HO-Cap), about 1,107 hours and 290 tasks, into a single schema. Every clip's hand pose is normalized to the MANO 21-joint layout in the camera frame with per-joint visibility masks, and paired with intention-aligned, timestamped language primitives: a task instruction, atomic substeps, and verb-noun actions tagged by actor (left, right, or both hands). The authors validate the dataset by training language-conditioned imitation policies that predict dexterous hand trajectories. Distribution is mixed-openness: code is MIT and the corpus is shared through a Box link, but each source keeps its own license and the EgoDex-derived subset requires author permission.
datapath_cn: OpenEgo 将六个公开第一人称语料库（CaptainCook4D、HOI4D、HoloAssist、EgoDex、HOT3D 与 HO-Cap，约 1,107 小时、290 个任务）整合为统一的模式。每个片段的手部姿态被归一化到相机坐标系下的 MANO 21 关节布局，并附带逐关节可见性掩码，同时配以意图对齐、带时间戳的语言基元：任务指令、原子子步骤，以及按执行者（左手、右手或双手）标注的动词-名词动作。作者通过训练语言条件的模仿学习策略（预测灵巧手轨迹）来验证数据集。其分发为混合开放：代码采用 MIT 并通过 Box 链接共享语料，但每个来源保留各自许可，且 EgoDex 衍生子集需作者许可。
flow_cn: 接入六个第一人称语料库
将手部姿态标准化为 MANO 21 关节
添加可见性与遮挡掩码
对齐带时间戳的语言基元
整合语料 + 模仿策略验证
no_corpus_en: OpenEgo unifies six datasets whose licenses differ, several of them non-commercial or no-derivatives (for example EgoDex is CC BY-NC-ND), and its EgoDex-derived annotation subset is gated behind author permission. Because the merged language layer carries these mixed and partly restrictive source licenses, this atlas documents OpenEgo descriptively with links rather than redistributing the consolidated strings.
no_corpus_cn: OpenEgo 整合的六个数据集许可各异，其中多个为非商业或禁止演绎（例如 EgoDex 为 CC BY-NC-ND），且其 EgoDex 衍生标注子集需作者许可。由于合并后的语言层带有这些混合且部分受限的来源许可，本图谱以描述性方式记录 OpenEgo 并提供链接，而非再分发整合后的字符串。
example_caption_en: OpenEgo aligns high and low level language with egocentric manipulation; the paper teaser figure shows the annotation layout.
example_caption_cn: OpenEgo 将高层与低层语言与第一人称操作对齐；论文示意图展示了标注布局。
provenance: Verified via arXiv 2509.05513, openegocentric.com, and github.com/ahadjawaid/openego (code MIT). Constituent datasets keep their own licenses; the EgoDex-derived subset is gated.
citation: Jawaid and Xiang, OpenEgo: A Large-Scale Multimodal Egocentric Dataset for Dexterous Manipulation, arXiv:2509.05513 (2025).
